overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars video game showing a female character exploring an industrial living quarters. The character moves through a furnished room with metal walls and green curtains, collects an item, and proceeds through a kitchen area toward a brightly lit exit door.

low table with items on top in front of the sofa
hanging metal lamps providing warm illumination
small wooden table with a candle lamp and collectible item

segments.scene_description: The character explores a cozy industrial living quarters with a curved sofa, metal barrels, and green curtains. Warm artificial lighting illuminates the space as the character walks around examining the environment.

crates and containers holding various supplies

segments.scene_description: The character interacts with a collectible on a side table, then transitions through green curtains into a kitchen galley area. The space features metal counters, shelving units, and storage containers as the character moves deeper into the facility.

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the rear kitchen storage area past metal lockers and racks, approaching an exit door. Bright natural light streams in from outside, creating a stark contrast with the dim interior as the character reaches the doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cozy industrial living space that gradually transitions into a functional galley and opens toward a bright exterior. It begins by tracking the character as she explores a room furnished with a curved sofa, metal barrels, and green curtains under warm artificial lighting. As she interacts with a collectible on a side table, the camera follows her through the green curtains and into a kitchen galley filled with metal counters and storage containers. The scene then shifts deeper into the facility, moving past metal lockers and racks in a rear storage area. Finally, the dim interior gives way to a stark contrast as the character approaches an exit door where bright natural light streams in from outside.
